scripts.k6:vcontent:local: docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway --env-file env/local.env -e VUS=50 -e DURATION=30s -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run scripts/vcontent/main.js
scripts.k6:vcontent:dev: docker run --rm --env-file env/dev.env -e VUS=5 -e DURATION=15s -v $(pwd):/app -w /app grafana/k6 run scripts/vcontent/main.js
